# Posaconazole 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Posaconazole 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Posaconazole</strong> 目前有 <strong>26 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Posaconazole 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Posaconazole AHCL oral suspension is indicated for use in the treatment of the following fungal infections in adults:  Invasive aspergillosis in patients with disease that is refractory to...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>pneumocystosis（99.8%）</li>
<li>mycetoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>aspergillosis（99.0%）</li>
<li>vulvovaginal candidiasis（98.9%）</li>
<li>leprosy（98.8%）</li>
<li>candidiasis（98.7%）</li>
<li>multibacillary leprosy（98.6%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（98.5%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（98.5%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（98.4%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（98.4%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（98.3%）</li>
<li>fusariosis（98.1%）</li>
<li>paucibacillary leprosy（98.0%）</li>
<li>lepromatous leprosy（97.8%）</li>
<li>borderline leprosy（97.8%）</li>
<li>multidrug-resistant tuberculosis（97.8%）</li>
<li>hyperargininemia（97.5%）</li>
<li>Cryptococcal meningitis（97.4%）</li>
<li>geotrichosis（97.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/posaconazole/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
